category.scope_note: Grid-tied photovoltaic inverter comparison. Energy storage inverter and hybrid storage functions are excluded.

labels.zh: 并网光伏逆变器（不含储能）
labels.zht: 併網光伏逆變器（不含儲能）

title.en: China-to-Brazil Solar Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国光伏逆变器进入巴西：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國光伏逆變器進入巴西：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China grid-tied PV inverter documentation against Brazil INMETRO certification, ABNT NBR 16149/16150 grid requirements, and safety expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国并网光伏逆变器文件与巴西 INMETRO 认证、ABNT NBR 16149/16150 并网要求及安全要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國併網光伏逆變器文件與巴西 INMETRO 認證、ABNT NBR 16149/16150 併網要求及安全要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INMETRO approval, grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Brazilian INMETRO, ABNT, grid-connection, utility, and installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INMETRO 批准、并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴西 INMETRO、ABNT、并网、电力公司及安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INMETRO 批准、併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴西 INMETRO、ABNT、併網、電力公司及安裝要求。

answer_first.en: INMETRO certification to ABNT NBR 16149/16150 grid and safety requirements is mandatory; Chinese certificates are not accepted.
answer_first.zh: 符合 ABNT NBR 16149/16150 并网及安全要求的 INMETRO 认证是强制要求；中国证书不能被接受替代。
answer_first.zht: 符合 ABNT NBR 16149/16150 併網及安全要求的 INMETRO 認證是強制要求；中國證書不能被接受替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, certification body, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
